AccessControlUpdated(address,uint8,bool).details: Emitted when access control is updated for an account

params.access: whether role is granted or revoked

CumulativeFactorUpdated(uint256,uint40).details: Triggered when a pair's cumulative factor is updated

DepthBandsMappingUpdated(uint256,uint256.details: Emitted when depth bands mapping is updated

params.slot1: Slot 1 data containing the first 14 bands offsets
params.slot2: Slot 2 data containing the last 16 bands offsets

ExemptAfterProtectionCloseFactorUpdated(.details: Triggered when a pair's exemptAfterProtectionCloseFactor value is updated

params.exemptAfterProtectionCloseFactor: whether the pair is exempt of price impact on close once protection close factor has expired

ExemptOnOpenUpdated(uint256,bool).details: Triggered when a pair's exemptOnOpen value is updated

params.exemptOnOpen: whether the pair is exempt of price impact on open

Initialized(uint8).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

OnePercentDepthUpdated(uint256,uint128,u.details: Triggered when a pair's 1% depth is updated (for cumulative volume price impact).

params.valueAboveUsd: new USD depth above the price
params.valueBelowUsd: new USD depth below the price

OnePercentSkewDepthUpdated(uint8,uint16,.details: Triggered when a pair's 1% depth is updated (for skew price impact).

params.newValue: new depth above/below the price (1e18, token)

PairDepthBandsUpdated(uint256,uint256,ui.details: Triggered when a pair's depth bands are updated.

params.aboveSlot1: first slot for above bands (totalDepthUsd + 14 bands)
params.aboveSlot2: second slot for above bands (16 bands)
params.belowSlot1: first slot for below bands (totalDepthUsd + 14 bands)
params.belowSlot2: second slot for below bands (16 bands)

PairOiAfterV10Updated(uint8,uint16,uint2.details: Triggered when a pair's OI after v10 is updated.

params.long: true for long, false for short
params.newOiCollateral: new OI collateral after v10 (collateral precision)
params.oiDeltaCollateral: open interest delta in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params.open: whether it corresponds to opening or closing a trade

PriceImpactOiTransferredPair(uint256,(ui.details: Triggered when a pair's OI is transferred to a new window.

params.totalPairOi: total USD long/short OI of the pair (1e18 precision)

PriceImpactOiTransferredPairs(uint256,ui.details: Triggered when multiple pairs' OI are transferred to a new window (when updating windows duration).

params.newCurrentWindowId: new current window ID corresponding to new window duration
params.prevCurrentWindowId: previous current window ID corresponding to previous window duration
params.prevEarliestWindowId: previous earliest window ID corresponding to previous window duration

PriceImpactOpenInterestAdded((address,ui.details: Triggered when OI is added to a window.

params.oiWindowUpdate: OI window update details (windowsDuration, pairIndex, windowId, etc.)

ProtectionCloseFactorBlocksUpdated(uint2.details: Triggered when a pair's protection close factor duration is updated

ProtectionCloseFactorUpdated(uint256,uin.details: Triggered when a pair's protection close factor is updated

ProtectionCloseFactorWhitelistUpdated(ad.details: Triggered when a trader is whitelisted/unwhitelisted from protection close factor

params.whitelisted: true if whitelisted, false if unwhitelisted

UserPriceImpactUpdated(address,uint16,ui.details: Triggered when a trader's price impact data is updated

addPriceImpactOpenInterest(address,uint3.details: Adds open interest to current window

params._isPnlPositive: whether it corresponds to a positive pnl trade (only relevant when _open = false)
params._open: whether it corresponds to opening or closing a trade

getDepthBandsMapping().details: Returns the global depth band offset mapping. See `DepthBandsMapping` struct for layout.

returns.slot1: Encoded offsets for bands 0–13 (first 32 bits unused).

getDepthBandsMappingDecoded().details: Returns the decoded global depth band offset mapping.

returns.bands: Array of offsets in parts per million (1e4 %).

getNegPnlCumulVolMultiplier().details: Returns negative pnl cumulative volume multiplier

getOiWindows(uint48,uint256,uint256[]).details: Returns multiple OI windows details (long/short OI)

getOiWindowsSettings().details: Returns current price impact windows settings

getPairDepthBands(uint256).details: Returns the encoded depth bands for a specific pair. See `PairDepthBands` struct for layout.

getPairDepthBandsArray(uint256[]).details: Returns encoded depth bands for multiple trading pairs. See `PairDepthBands` struct for layout.

getPairDepthBandsDecoded(uint256).details: Returns the decoded depth bands for a specific pair.

getPairDepthBandsDecodedArray(uint256[]).details: Returns the decoded depth bands for multiple pairs.

returns.bandsAbove: Array of above bands liquidity percentages bps (1e2 %).
returns.bandsBelow: Array of below bands liquidity percentages bps (1e2 %).
returns.totalDepthAboveUsd: Array of total depth above in USD (1e18).
returns.totalDepthBelowUsd: Array of total depth below in USD (1e18).

getPairFactors(uint256[]).details: Returns factors for a set of pairs (1e10)

getPairOiAfterV10Collateral(uint8,uint16.details: Returns a pair's open interest in collateral tokens after v10 (collateral precision)

getPairOiAfterV10Token(uint8,uint16).details: Returns a pair's open interest in tokens after v10 (1e18)

getPairOisAfterV10Collateral(uint8[],uin.details: Returns multiple pairs' open interests in collateral tokens after v10 (collateral precision)

getPairOisAfterV10Token(uint8[],uint16[].details: Returns multiple pairs' open interests in tokens after v10 (collateral precision)

getPairSkewDepth(uint8,uint16).details: Returns a pair's depths above and below the price (for skew price impact)

getPairSkewDepths(uint8[],uint16[]).details: Returns depths above and below the price for multiple pairs for skew price impact (tokens, 1e18)

getPriceImpactOi(uint256,bool).details: Returns active open interest used in price impact calculation for a pair and side (long/short)

params._long: true for long, false for short

getProtectionCloseFactorWhitelist(addres.details: Returns whether a trader is whitelisted from protection close factor

getTradeCumulVolPriceImpactP(address,uin.details: Returns cumulative volume price impact % (1e10 precision) for a trade

params._isPnlPositive: true if positive pnl, false if negative pnl (only relevant when _open = false)
params._lastPosIncreaseBlock: block when trade position size was last increased (only relevant when _open = false)
params._long: true for long, false for short
params._open: true on open, false on close
params._tradeOpenInterestUsd: open interest of trade in USD (1e18 precision)
params._trader: trader address (to check if whitelisted from protection close factor)

getTradeSkewPriceImpactP(uint8,uint16,bo.details: Returns skew price impact % (1e10 precision) for a trade

params._long: true for long, false for short
params._open: true on open, false on close
params._positionSizeToken: open interest of trade in tokens (1e18)

getUserPriceImpact(address,uint256).details: Returns a trader's price impact settings on a particular pair

getUserPriceImpactArray(address,uint256[.details: Returns a trader's price impact settings for an array of pairs

hasRole(address,uint8).details: Returns whether an account has been granted a particular role

hasRoles(address,uint8,uint8).details: Returns whether an account has been granted at least one of two roles

initializeDepthBandsMapping(uint256,uint.details: Initializes depth bands mapping for price impact calculation

params._govEmergencyTimelock: address to be granted emergency timelock role

initializeNegPnlCumulVolMultiplier(uint4.details: Initializes negative pnl cumulative volume multiplier

setDepthBandsMapping(uint256,uint256).details: Sets the global depth band offset mapping. See `DepthBandsMapping` struct for layout.

params._slot1: Encoded offsets for bands 0–13 (first 32 bits unused).

setExemptAfterProtectionCloseFactor(uint.details: Sets whether pairs are exempt from price impact on close once protection close factor has expired

setExemptOnOpen(uint16[],bool[]).details: Sets whether pairs are exempt from price impact on open

setNegPnlCumulVolMultiplier(uint40).details: Updates negative pnl cumulative volume multiplier

setPairDepthBands(uint256[],(uint256,uin.details: Sets encoded depth bands for price impact calculation per trading pair. See `PairDepthBands` struct for layout.

params._depthBands: Array of PairDepthBands structs with above/below slot encoding.

setPairSkewDepths(uint8[],uint16[],uint2.details: Updates pairs 1% depths above and below (for skew price impact)Has to be manually updated from time to time based on desired speed of arbitrage (not too often to not cause imbalances)

params._depths: depths in tokens (1e18, 0 = no price impact)

setProtectionCloseFactorBlocks(uint16[],.details: Sets protection close factor blocks duration for pairs

setProtectionCloseFactorWhitelist(addres.details: Whitelists/unwhitelists traders from protection close factor

setProtectionCloseFactors(uint16[],uint4.details: Sets protection close factors for pairs

setRoles(address[],uint8[],bool[]).details: Updates access control for a list of accounts

setUserPriceImpact(address[],uint16[],ui.details: Updates traders price impact settings for pairs

updatePairOiAfterV10(uint8,uint16,uint25.details: Updates pair stored open interest after v10

params._long: true for long, false for short
params._oiDeltaCollateral: open interest delta in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params._open: whether it corresponds to opening or closing a trade
